name: Base
facts: Clear L2 leader: $5.6B peak TVL (46.6% of all L2 DeFi TVL) as of late 2025
Coinbase pursuing 'everything exchange' strategy: crypto + equities + prediction markets + commodities on Base
Coinbase partnered with Kalshi for prediction markets; notifications pushed to all users
Morpho integration via Coinbase app drove deposits from $354M to $2B+ (key distribution pattern for LEVER to study)
Tokenized equities launched: $2.46B monthly transfer volume (up 76%)
LEVER Protocol is deployed on Base Sepolia (testnet, chain ID 84532)
Mainnet Base is the target for LEVER production deployment in Q2 2026
